Title: Authorizes the designation of active recovery zones within municipalities
Summary: Authorizes the chief executive of a responding law enforcement agency to designate an area within a municipality as an active recovery zone in response to certain natural or man-made disasters or emergencies; limits access to such zones to residents and other affected persons, first responders, and certain authorized personnel; imposes a penalty of a class B misdemeanor for knowing unauthorized access to such zones; makes related provisions.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to authorizing the designation of active recovery zones within municipalities
